title: repo_blocklist
description: Explicit 'never contribute to this repo' list. Highest authority: overrides every other signal. Empty `reason` is allowed but discouraged. `expires_at`=null means permanent. Owner: user (manual edit). Readers: repo-finder, orchestrator (Phase 0).

version.description: Schema version; increment on breaking changes

blocked.description: Ordered list of repos that must never be contributed to

reason.description: Human-readable reason; empty string is allowed but discouraged

added_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this entry was added

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 expiry timestamp, or null for permanent block
